response: This code implements the **Knuth-Morris-Pratt (KMP) algorithm** for substring search. It first preprocesses the pattern to create a **Longest Prefix Suffix (LPS)** array, which stores the length of the longest proper prefix that is also a suffix for each substring of the pattern. Then, it uses this LPS array to efficiently search for the pattern in the text without backtracking, achieving linear time complexity O(n + m).
